About Double A

Transport solutions built around your business

Double A Holdings Limited is a Tanzania-based transport and logistics company serving businesses that require dependable cargo movement and coordinated logistics support.

Our services combine road transport, maritime transport, air freight, warehousing, distribution, customs-clearance assistance and end-to-end logistics coordination.

We focus on quality, safety and reliable service while helping customers move cargo efficiently from origin to destination.

Discover Our Company
A
Our Services

One logistics partner. Multiple transport solutions.

From local road transport to international freight and final distribution, Double A Holdings Limited coordinates the services required to move cargo safely and efficiently.

Road Transport

Efficient and flexible cargo transportation by road, coordinated around the client’s delivery requirements.

Explore

Maritime Transport

Coordinated sea-freight solutions for cargo moving through ports and international shipping routes.

Explore

Air Freight

Fast and coordinated air-freight support for urgent, valuable and time-sensitive shipments.

Explore

Warehousing and Distribution

Storage and distribution coordination designed to keep cargo organized and moving toward its final destination.

Explore

Customs Clearance

Support with customs documentation and cargo-clearance processes to reduce unnecessary delays.

Explore

End-to-End Logistics

Integrated logistics support from initial pickup through transportation, clearance and final delivery.

Explore
Road Transport

Dependable transport for every mile

Our road-transport solutions are designed to help businesses move cargo efficiently between ports, warehouses, business locations and final destinations. We coordinate each movement according to the shipment requirements, route and expected delivery schedule.

  • Flexible cargo movement
  • Business-to-business transport
  • Port and warehouse transfers
  • Coordinated final delivery
  • Clear client communication
  • Safety-focused handling
Discuss Your Transport Requirements
Connected Logistics

From pickup to final destination

01

Enquiry

The client provides cargo, route and delivery information.

02

Planning

The shipment requirements and suitable transport method are reviewed.

03

Pickup

Cargo collection is coordinated from the agreed origin.

04

Transportation

Cargo moves through the selected road, air or maritime route.

05

Clearance and Handling

Required cargo-clearance and handling processes are coordinated.

06

Delivery

The shipment reaches its agreed final destination.

01

Enquiry

The client provides cargo, route and delivery information.

02

Planning

The shipment requirements and suitable transport method are reviewed.

03

Pickup

Cargo collection is coordinated from the agreed origin.

04

Transportation

Cargo moves through the selected road, air or maritime route.

05

Clearance and Handling

Required cargo-clearance and handling processes are coordinated.

06

Delivery

The shipment reaches its agreed final destination.

Why Double A

Professional transport backed by a clear commitment

01

Reliable

Count on us every time.

We coordinate transport services around the cargo requirements, expected route and delivery priorities.

02

Professional

Experienced support and trusted service.

Our approach emphasizes clear communication, responsible handling and practical transport coordination.

03

Dedicated

Focused on your success.

We work to understand each client’s requirements and organize the appropriate logistics solution.

Your cargo is not simply moved. It is coordinated with purpose.

Quality and Safety

A dependable approach to every shipment

Double A Holdings Limited places strong emphasis on responsible cargo handling, operational communication and reliable transport coordination. From the initial enquiry to final delivery, each shipment should be approached with attention to cargo requirements, route planning and client expectations.

Delivery

On-time service remains a central part of the company promise.

Quality

Each transport assignment should be coordinated professionally and with attention to detail.

Safety

Cargo safety and responsible transportation remain priorities throughout the journey.

Driven by values that keep business moving

01

Integrity

We do what is right.

02

Reliability

Clients should be able to count on us.

03

Teamwork

Strong coordination produces better transport outcomes.

04

Innovation

We seek better and more efficient ways to move cargo.

05

Excellence

We aim to maintain professional standards across our services.

Industries

Transport capabilities for growing businesses

Our transport and logistics capabilities can support businesses operating in a wide range of sectors.

  • Import and Export Businesses
  • Retail and Wholesale Distribution
  • Manufacturing
  • Construction and Building Materials
  • Agriculture and Food Distribution
  • Automotive
  • Consumer Goods
  • International Trade
  • Small and Medium-Sized Enterprises

Tell us what you need to move

Share the cargo details, origin, destination and preferred delivery date. Our team will review the information and contact you about the appropriate transport solution.
